mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations and compress corporate profit margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or forward returns are positive in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by >0.2 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and real GDP confirms robust aggregate demand, driving corporate earnings growth and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of cases or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates resolving supply bottlenecks and improving manufacturing output, generating positive short-term S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict positive returns during recovery phases or produces negative alpha in >55% of triggered windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces central banks to tighten monetary policy aggressively, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally in >60% of high-inflation trigger events or the signal shows no predictive power in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a stable or declining unemployment rate confirms a healthy labor market expansion, supporting consumer spending and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of observations or the interaction effect vanishes in out-of-sample validation.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts reflect strong consumer confidence and credit availability, leading to increased economic activity and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when HOUST rises or the signal Rank IC falls below 0.02 across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Stagnant industrial production alongside rising inflation indicates supply-side constraints and stagflation risks, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative returns during stagflationary periods or yields positive alpha in >50% of triggered instances.
